description: English: 'submit the request' is ambiguous between submit_purchase_request and submit_leave_request — confidence should be ≤ 0.7 and alternatives should include the runner-up

meta.notes: Resolver only surfaces alternatives when confidence < ALTERNATIVES_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (0.7). action_equals omitted — either submit_* is acceptable here. alternatives_includes_action is non-strict because we cannot deterministically predict which the model picks as primary vs alternative.
